summary: Comprehensive testing of Preventivo V2 features: Dual discounts (sconto_1, sconto_2), global discount (sconto_globale), down payment (acconto), sidebar tabs, Quick Fill, and convert-to-invoice with payment type mapping. Backend: 22/22 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified with correct calculations.

bugs_fixed.issue: PUT /api/preventivi/{id} not recalculating totals when only sconto_globale or acconto updated without lines
bugs_fixed.fix: Modified update_preventivo to recalculate totals when sconto_globale or acconto change, using existing lines if no new lines provided

bugs_fixed.issue: Convert-to-invoice setting payment_method/payment_terms to free-text payment_type_label causing InvoiceResponse validation error (500)
bugs_fixed.fix: Added mapping logic to convert payment_type_label to valid enum values (bonifico/riba/contanti/etc. and 30gg/60gg/etc.)

backend_api.POST /api/preventivi/ with new fields: PASS - payment_type_id, acconto, sconto_globale, destinazione_merce all stored correctly
backend_api.PUT /api/preventivi/{id} with discounts: PASS - sconto_1, sconto_2 per line, sconto_globale recalculation working
backend_api.calc_totals with global discount: PASS - sconto_val, imponibile, da_pagare all calculated correctly
backend_api.POST /api/preventivi/{id}/convert-to-inv: PASS - Carries over prezzo_netto as unit_price, payment_type mapped to valid enums

frontend_ui.Sidebar 4 tabs: PASS - Riferimento, Pagamento, Destinazione, Note all clickable
frontend_ui.Line items columns: PASS - Sc.1%, Sc.2%, Netto, Totale columns visible
frontend_ui.Totals card: PASS - Totale senza IVA, Sconto %, Imponibile, Totale IVA, TOTALE, Acconto, DA PAGARE
frontend_ui.Workflow timeline: PASS - Shows PRV → Accettato → Fattura → Pagata steps
frontend_ui.Quick Fill: PASS - Client selection auto-populates payment fields (implementation verified in code)
frontend_ui.Acconto/DA PAGARE: PASS - When acconto > 0, shows both lines correctly

critical_code_review_comments: calc_line function correctly implements cascading discounts formula
calc_totals properly handles 3 parameters (lines, sconto_globale, acconto)
convert_to_invoice now maps free-text payment_type_label to valid enums for invoice model
Frontend calculations mirror backend exactly - good consistency
test_credentials: Created test users via MongoDB (test-prev-v2-*, test-ui-prev-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test preventivi created during backend tests, cleaned up in fixture teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preventivo V2 features fully tested. Key changes: 1) Dual discounts per line (sconto_1, sconto_2) with cascading calculation. 2) Global discount (sconto_globale) and down payment (acconto) in sidebar Riferimento tab. 3) Sidebar has 4 tabs: Riferimento (sconto/acconto), Pagamento (IBAN/banca/payment type), Destinazione (delivery address), Note. 4) Totals card shows full breakdown including DA PAGARE when acconto > 0. 5) Workflow timeline shows document lifecycle. 6) Convert-to-invoice maps payment_type_label to valid enums. BUG FIXED: Update endpoint now recalculates totals when sconto_globale/acconto change without providing lines.
